item.name: VirusTotal Grant Group Admin Permissions to a List of Users

request.name: VirusTotal Grant Group Admin Permissions to a List of Users

description.content:
Update group administrator list. User emails must be used. If a username is used, a 400 error is returned.

No admins are removed by using this endpoint. To revoke admin privileges from a certain user, use [DELETE/groups/{id}/relationships/administrators/{user_id}](https://gtidocs.virustotal.com/reference/delete-user-group-administrator).
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: VirusTotal Add Users to a Group

request.name: VirusTotal Add Users to a Group

description.content:
Update the group's user list. User emails must be used, if a username is used a 400 error is returned.

No users are removed by using this endpoint. To remove group membership from a certain user, use [DELETE/groups/{id}/relationships/users/{user_id}](https://gtidocs.virustotal.com/reference/delete-user-from-group).
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: VirusTotal Get Objects Related to a Group

request.name: VirusTotal Get Objects Related to a Group

description.content:
Group objects have relationships to other objects. As mentioned in the  [Relationships](https://gtidocs.virustotal.com/reference/relationships) section, those related objects can be retrieved by sending `GET` requests to the relationship URL. 

The relationships supported by group objects are described in the [Group object section](https://gtidocs.virustotal.com/reference/group-object).

query.description: Maximum number of related objects to retrieve

item.name: VirusTotal Get a Group’s API Usage

request.name: VirusTotal Get a Group’s API Usage

description.content:
This endpoint retrieves information about a the API usage, broken down by endpoint, of a group in a specific range of days (last 30 days by default).  
The period of time can be delimited by the two query parameters **start_date** and **end_date**, being the first and last day when API V3 usage data will be retrieved, respectively.  
The data available includes only the last 60 natural days.

> 🚧 Time range restrictions
> 
> The maximum range of time allowed by this endpoint is 30 days. If a greater range of time is specified, this endpoint will return an error message as response.

To use this endpoint and get the API consumption of a certain group, you must be an administrator of that group.

item.name: Access Control - User Management

description.content: Access Control - User Management

item.name: VirusTotal Delete a User

request.name: VirusTotal Delete a User

description.content:
This request deletes a given user. A user account can only be deleted by its owner, a 403 error is returned otherwise.

An additional `x-user-password` header is required, which is used as confirmation.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: VirusTotal Get a User Object

request.name: VirusTotal Get a User Object

description.content:
This endpoint retrieves information about a user, including the privileges and quotas associated to the user. The user can be retrieved either by user ID or by API key, but the former only works if the requester is the user himself or an administrator of a group the user belongs to.

Returns an [User](https://gtidocs.virustotal.com/reference/user-object) object.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: VirusTotal Get Objects Related to a User

request.name: VirusTotal Get Objects Related to a User

description.content:
Users are related to other objects in our dataset. As mentioned in the [Relationships](https://gtidocs.virustotal.com/reference/relationships) section, those related objects can be retrieved by sending `GET` requests to this API endpoint.

Some relationships are only accessible to their account's owners and their group's admins.

The supported relationships are documented in the [User](https://gtidocs.virustotal.com/reference/user-object#relationships) API object page.

query.description: Maximum number of related objects to retrieve

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
